paper.title_en: Low-temperature Quantum-corrected Holographic Transport with Momentum Relaxation
paper.abstract_en: We determine the quantum corrections to transport arising from fluctuations of the near-AdS${}_2$ throat of near-extremal black branes in holographic models with momentum relaxation. By computing the shear viscosity and electrical conductivity at both zero and finite chemical potential, we uncover a universal low-temperature enhancement of transport generated by Schwarzian quantum fluctuations. Specifically, transport coefficients extracted from retarded Green's functions increase throughout the regime $C T \ll 1$. For operators with Schwarzian scaling dimension $Δ>1$, this enhancement is preceded by a universal minimum at a characteristic temperature $T_{\rm min} \propto C^{-1}$, leading to a non-monotonic temperature dependence strikingly similar to that observed in many correlated materials. In contrast, for the case $Δ=1$, relevant for the electrical conductivity, the transport coefficient evolves monotonically toward a constant value. Our results identify universal signatures of near-horizon quantum gravity in the transport properties of holographic quantum matter.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文利用全息对偶研究动量弛豫模型中的低温和量子修正输运，展示了Schwarzian涨落导致的普适增强和非单调温度行为，与强关联材料现象相似，理论深度高，方法严谨，属于全息凝聚态物理核心方向。
decision.title_zh: 低温和量子修正的全息输运与动量弛豫
decision.abstract_zh: 我们确定了由近极端黑膜中近AdS2喉道的涨落引起的量子修正输运，这些黑膜出现在具有动量弛豫的全息模型中。通过计算零化学势和有限化学势下的剪切粘度和电导率，我们揭示了由Schwarzian量子涨落产生的低温和普适增强。具体而言，从延迟格林函数提取的输运系数在整个CT << 1的区域内增加。对于Schwarzian标度维数Δ > 1的算符，这种增强之前存在一个特征温度T_min ∝ C^{-1}处的普适极小值，导致非单调温度依赖性，与在许多关联材料中观察到的行为惊人相似。相反，对于与电导率相关的Δ = 1的情况，输运系数单调演变至一个常数值。我们的结果在全息量子物质的输运性质中识别出了近视界量子引力的普适特征。
